name: Mang - Rain World Oc
description:
Art made by: ArtiScug on youtube, he does rain world OC requests! (If it wasnt obvious, Mang is based on Fizaroh, my profile OC but rain worldfied)

Scenario by: Toriz (rain world rpg)

Despite mang being a slugcat form of Fizaroh, they have completly diferent lores and character, expect mang judging your very soul and then offer you a karma flower because he "felt like it"

Perhaps i should make rain world OCs into bots? What do yall think?

Spoiler for next bot:
